prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. Drawn on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one clean flat square block with no smaller detail, smooth gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. A single centered Fowl Harvest Equipment item in three-quarter display angle for Black-Oil Locket: a LARGE chunky oil-black heart-or-oval locket filling most of the grid, with a restrained rust-orange (#bf532f) seam and one small condiment-red (#c83d3d) warning glint. Body is oil-ink and crow-black only with bruise-plum depth. Selective one-logical-pixel oil-ink outline. The subject long side MUST span 26–30 logical pixels, with exactly two full magenta cells of clearance on every edge. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background, nothing else in frame. Use ONLY these named fowl-harvest-24 flat colors: oil-ink, crow-black, bruise-plum, storm-slate, rust-orange-deep, beak-orange, condiment-red, diner-cream — 8 flat colors maximum, no other hues. Structural members are at least three logical pixels thick. No Character, duck body, scene, shadow, glow, sparks, particles, text, watermark, UI frame, or transparency. No purple wash, pink, cyan, wood brown, or off-palette metals.
